mechanisms.economic_hypothesis: Index-arbitrage desks and broad ETF hedgers transmit a strong majority move from three equity futures into the lagging fourth future after the opening hour.
mechanisms.who_pays: Slow benchmark rebalancers and sector-concentrated participants whose hedges reach the lagging index after the broad move is established.
mechanisms.signal: At 09:30 CT, at least two peers share a sign, peer median absolute 08:30-09:30 return exceeds its past-only 60-session median, and target absolute return is below peer median; trade target in consensus direction.
mechanisms.entry_exit: Enter 09:31 CT after the completed decision bar; exit 14:30 CT.

mechanisms.economic_hypothesis: An extreme opening NQ-minus-RTY leadership spread is partly inventory-driven and compresses as cross-index hedgers rebalance before the close.
mechanisms.who_pays: Opening momentum chasers and temporarily unbalanced relative-index hedges.
mechanisms.signal: At 10:00 CT, absolute NQ-minus-RTY 08:30-10:00 return spread exceeds its past-only 60-session q75; short the relative leader through the target leg and buy the relative laggard through the target leg.
mechanisms.entry_exit: Enter 10:01 CT after the completed decision bar; exit 14:30 CT.

mechanisms.economic_hypothesis: Friday weekly-option gamma hedging counteracts an unusually large first-hour ES or NQ move during the remaining cash session.
mechanisms.who_pays: First-hour directional traders crossing against dealer hedge rebalancing into weekly option expiry.
mechanisms.signal: On Friday at 09:30 CT, absolute 08:30-09:30 return exceeds the median of the prior 20 Fridays; trade opposite the first-hour move.
mechanisms.entry_exit: Enter 09:31 CT after the completed decision bar; exit 14:30 CT.

mechanisms.economic_hypothesis: When related ecologies confirm a large pre-open macro repricing synchronously, commercial and allocation hedges continue the target-market move after the equity cash open.
mechanisms.who_pays: Participants completing energy-demand or safe-haven allocation after the common macro state is already observable.
mechanisms.signal: At 08:30 CT, ES and CL same-sign 07:30-08:30 moves above their past-only 60-session medians continue in CL; opposite-sign ES and GC moves above medians continue in GC's observed direction.
mechanisms.entry_exit: Enter 08:31 CT after the completed decision bar; exit 12:00 CT.

mechanisms.economic_hypothesis: Large Wednesday crude repricing around the nominal EIA inventory release continues while physical and macro hedgers digest the inventory surprise.
mechanisms.who_pays: Slower commercial hedgers and participants waiting for post-release confirmation.
mechanisms.signal: On Wednesday at 09:35 CT, absolute CL 09:30-09:35 return exceeds the median of the prior 20 Wednesdays; trade in the release-window direction. Holiday-shift weeks remain noise by preregistration.
mechanisms.entry_exit: Enter 09:36 CT after the completed decision bar; exit 12:00 CT.

CONTRE: Calendar labels and cross-market consensus may still proxy generic intraday drift rather than the stated counterparties; matched-day and delay controls are therefore mandatory before any promotion.
